meaning: adj.<俚>蹩脚的 没价值的 讨厌的
examples: It's really poor form to diss Apple by comparing it to your own crappy product.
You whine to anyone who wants to hear—and many who don't—about how crappy your job, life and boss is.
It's that crappy Flash of theirs.
Still, I think two additional factors have caused Americans to feel crappy about their economy.
There are no more crappy base level enemies that die in a few swings.
